content: Multi-line vertical centering with tspan: compute total block height = lineCount * lineHeight, set first line y = containerCenterY - totalHeight/2 + lineHeight/2 (baseline offset via fontSize*~0.35 ascent adjustment), then each subsequent tspan uses dy=lineHeight relative offset. This matches the existing textShapeUtil.render pattern (dy per tspan) already in the codebase and should be extended rather than replaced.
